title: Why Defensiveness Damages Relationships (And What Emotionally Intelligent People Do Instead)
description: Why do good people get defensive when they hurt someone? Learn the psychology behind defensiveness, the difference between intent and impact, and how therapy in Vancouver can help you communicate without losing connection.

title: What Love on the Spectrum Teaches Us About Autism
description: What does Love on the Spectrum reveal about autism, relationships, and identity? Explore the show's cultural impact, common questions about adult autism diagnosis, and how to access an autism assessment in Vancouver, BC.

title: Men's Mental Health Month: The Male Loneliness Epidemic
description: Explore the male loneliness epidemic during Men's Mental Health Month, including statistics on emotional isolation, ADHD, autism, depression, anxiety, and how men can build stronger connection and wellbeing.

title: Early Dating Red Flags: Narcissistic Patterns
description: Learn early dating red flags, narcissistic relationship patterns, trauma bonding, attachment wounds, and how to tell the difference between chemistry and healthy compatibility.

title: Mental Health Awareness Month: How You Can Master Awareness of Your Mental Health this Month (and Onwards!)
description: Mental Health Awareness Month reflections on self-awareness, emotional wellbeing, and practical ways to better understand yourself through self-reflection, mindfulness, and personal growth.

title: Welcome to the Pacific Maple Psych Centre Blog
description: An introduction to the Pacific Maple Psych Centre blog, outlining our approach to mental health education, evidence-based psychology, and the topics we will explore including anxiety, trauma, relationships, neurodivergence, personal growth, and more.
